title: Traditional Greek Spanakopita
description: A classic Greek savory pie filled with spinach, feta cheese, and herbs, wrapped in flaky phyllo dough.

ingredients.name: spinach
ingredients.amount: 1 package (10 oz) frozen, thawed and drained

instructions: Thaw phyllo dough according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat.
Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add spinach and cook until wilted, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in feta cheese, parmesan cheese, and green onions.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and black pepper.
Layer phyllo dough in a baking dish, brushing each layer with butter.
Spread spinach mixture over the top layer of phyllo dough.
Pour egg mixture over the spinach mixture.
Cover with remaining phyllo dough, brushing with butter.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
Let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
